title: Shloo and the Starlight Rock
cover_prompt: A small, round, silver-furred creature with wide, glowing eyes curled in a crescent moon’s embrace, floating gently among soft, twinkling stars. The sky is painted in deep blues and purples, with a warm, golden glow around the edges, like a cozy blanket of starlight.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm shloo na na
Ooh la lu la
Haa noo noo shh
Eeh sha sha sha

[verse]
Pff lu lu mmm
Aah na na na
Tss ooh la lu
Mmm sha sha shh

[verse]
Hoo noo noo mmm
Eeh la lu la
Shloo na na shh
Ooh sha sha sha

---
style_prompt: Traditional cradle song, warm maternal female vocal, harp arpeggios, 6/8 time signature, 64 BPM, swaying rocking rhythm, gentle lilting motion, the feeling of being carried and rocked, celtic lullaby influence, repetitive swinging pattern, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Shloo
character.identity: A tiny, weightless creature who drifts through the night sky, rocking the stars to sleep.
character.special: Carries the rhythm of the universe in their breath, soothing even the brightest, most restless stars.

about: A swaying, vestibular lullaby that mimics the gentle rocking of a cradle or a boat on calm waters. The soft, alternating high-low syllables create a soothing rhythm, helping little ones release tension and drift into sleep as they imagine floating among the stars with Shloo.
